rulings.Case Title: JAMES SAUNDERS VS. CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses From Pltf'S To Form Interrogatory 17.1
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 22, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANTs CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER INC and WILLIAM PENN HOTEL, L.P.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff's To Form Interrogatory 17.1 GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Plaintiff shall provide the contact information for each of the individuals identified in the Amended Responses, including witnesses and medical provides. The motion is otherwise denied. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES SAUNDERS VS. CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER INC et al

rulings.Case Title: JIAMAO ENTERPRISE (USA) INC. VS. DANIEL E. OSUNDE
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 22, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT DANIEL OSUNDE's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Continued to July 29, 2014. Plaintiff shall file a substantive opposition, if any, no later than July 25, 2014. No written reply. Defendant's counsel shall file a declaration under penalty of perjury re: failure to comply with the Court's July 15, 2014 order. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: JUNE L. BAIONI, CO-TRUSTEE OF THE BAIONI FAMILY VS. ANTHONY LIMTIACO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 22, 2014, line 7. PLAINTIFF JUNE L. BAIONI's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Requests for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $885. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: VISTA DEL MONTE AFFORDABLE HOUSING INC. VS. CRYSTAL LEWIS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 22, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT CRYSTAL LEWIS' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED. Defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 473.5. = (501/LKS)
